name: llm-guard-kit
summary: v0.20.0: FARL discovery loop (230 novel failures, 3 modes), MiniJudge retrained AUROC 0.7638 (+0.033, SIGNIFICANT), A2A v0.5 replay protection (31/31 security tests), real DuckDuckGo search backend, confident_wrong failure mode. v0.19.0: FARL ablation + A2A HMAC replay protection. v0.18.0: exp156 cross-domain MiniJudge (AUROC 0.731 → 0.769). v0.16.0: hosted calibration endpoint, multilevel features, 3-domain validation, latency SLA. v0.15.0: probe_ensemble_blend() +1.6pp AUROC.
author: Avighan Majumder
